#+TITLE: Table Edge Cases

* Simple tables

| a | b |
| c | d |

| Name  | Age | City    |
|-------+-----+---------|
| Alice | 30  | Berlin  |
| Bob   | 25  | Hamburg |

* Misaligned tables (formatter should fix)

|Name|Age|City|
|---|---|---|
|Alice|30|Berlin|
|Bob|25|Hamburg|

| Name | Age |
|---+---|
|Alice | 30 |
| Bob|25|

* Uneven column counts

| a | b | c |
| d | e |
| f |

* Wide content

| A very long column header that pushes width | Short |
|----------------------------------------------+-------|
| data                                         | x     |

* Empty table

| |
| |

* Table with only separator

|---|

* Single column table

| a |
| b |
| c |

* Unicode content in tables

| Name   | Emoji |
|--------+-------|
| Ñoño   | 🎉    |
| Ü      | ä     |
| 日本語 | 中文  |

* Table immediately after heading (no blank line)
| a | b |
| c | d |

* Multiple separators

| Header |
|--------|
| data   |
|--------|
| more   |
|--------|

* Table at end of file with no trailing newline
| x | y |
| z | w |
